---
title: "Projects"
---

## Automated Fugl-Meyer Assessment and Data Augmentation

At the UCLA Bionics Lab, I worked on deep learning models for automated stroke assessment using time-series sensor and computer vision data. My contributions included evaluating CNN, LSTM, and hybrid architectures, implementing subject-wise data splitting to avoid leakage, and experimenting with augmentation methods such as jittering, interpolation, and conditional GANs.\
[Student Research Program Report](finalreport2.pdf){target="_blank"}

## Predicting Norwegian Residential EV Charging Loads

Built a PyTorch sequential model to predict residential EV charging demand, outperforming regression baselines and improving forecasting for utility planning.

## Uber Fare Prediction

Implemented a feature-engineered XGBoost regression model for fare prediction, achieving a low RMSE and improving pricing accuracy.

## Connect N Game

Built a C++ game engine with multiple classes and a minimax-based SmartPlayer, focusing on efficient game-tree search and optimized response time.

## Selected Writing

### Bruin Sports Analytics

-   [How Xabi Alonso transformed Bayer Leverkusen](https://www.bruinsportsanalytics.com/post/leverkusen-success){target="_blank"}
-   [Does possession still matter in the Premier League?](https://www.bruinsportsanalytics.com/post/possession-english-premier){target="_blank"}

### Daily Bruin

-   [Investigation into UCLA dining and pest-control spending](https://dailybruin.com/2026/01/16/investigation-reveals-ucla-dining-cut-pest-control-budget-ahead-of-rat-infestation){target="_blank"}
-   [UCLA Greek life community report analysis](https://dailybruin.com/2025/10/16/ucla-releases-community-report-assessing-greek-life-performance-involvement){target="_blank"}
